verse_text: She who is in Babylon, elect together with you, greets you; and so does Mark my son.

links.context: John whose surname was Mark is St. Mark the Evangelist, who would compose the Gospel of Mark. He would later become a coworker with Paul and Barnabas (v. 25; [[COL.4:10]]) and still later with Peter ([[1PE.5:13]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: Roman law stated harlots must wear headbands exhibiting their name. This great harlot bears the mysterious name of BABYLON... MOTHER OF HARLOTS. For the late-first-century Christians, Babylon was incarnate in Rome (see [[1PE.5:13]]), but it is primarily a spiritual reality, a "mystery," transcending concrete manifestations. For Babylon has always stood for rebellion against God (see Gn 11): self-exaltation and idolatry. She is the mother OF THE ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH (lit., "detestable things"), the prostitution of God's creation. And she finds her life in a perverse eucharist, the death of those united with Life Incarnate.

symbolic.title: Heaven and Earth: A Spiritual Perspective
